description: Deed of appointment for a kosher butcher Shemuel [surname lost]. Location: Cairo. Dated: [5]288 AM, which is 1527/28 CE. The term of the appointment is two years with a monthly salary of 40 medins. (information from Dotan Arad's editions.) MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
